content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.18%, Bank Nifty -0.13%, but breadth is selectively strong with Auto +0.73%, Metal +0.42% and many idiosyncratic earnings winners (BHEL, ADANIPORTS, BANDHANBNK, LALPATHLAB, TATATECH, SOBHA, NAVINFLUOR, HFCL, VEDL ex-demerger, ADANIGREEN). VIX at 18.04 modestly elevated; US markets soft overnight (Dow -1.13%). Existing book is 49% deployed with 9 holdings — focus is portfolio management (trail SLs on winners) rather than adding new exposure that would push cluster/sector concentration.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23880,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.3%, CMP 1045.60. Current SL 1029 is already above breakeven (entry 984), giving ~1.6% gap below CMP — within trail-gap discipline (>1% from LTP). Stock consolidating near pivot 1051; no need to tighten further. Holding HOLD-equivalent — but emitting MODIFY is unnecessary since values unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strike prior MODIFY: stored SL 1029 already above breakeven and ~1.6% below CMP — appropriate trail. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.5%, CMP 121.94, SL 119 (~2.4% below CMP). Gold geopolitical hedge thesis intact (Middle East tensions, rupee weak). MACD bearish near-term but structural uptrend (above SMA200 107.26). Hold to SL or recovery; no add given mid-band positioning after +81% YoY rally."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.1% at 1734.60. Stored SL 1710 already above entry 1700 (breakeven+) and ~1.4% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Values unchanged from stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1710 already locks breakeven+ with adequate 1.4% gap from CMP 1734.60. Q4 beat thesis intact; stock broke 52-week high today. No micro-adjust warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.9% at 13470 vs SL 13400 (~0.5% below CMP — tight). Stock recovered from intraday low 13360 closer to entry; April record sales catalyst still relevant. MACD bullish crossover, price above SMA20. Position to SL or recovery to target 14500. SL already tight; loosening prohibited and tightening would force exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.0% at 206.41, sector leader today +3.35% in weak Bank Nifty. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2% with expansion guidance, multiple TP upgrades. SL 204 ~1.2% below CMP, appropriate. Thesis intact — hold for target 220."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.0% at 4623.30. Stored SL 4555 is below entry 4575. Stock up +6.56% today on defence theme (US-Iran), volume normal. Tightening SL to entry (4575 = breakeven) gives 1.05% gap below CMP — meets trail-gap discipline (≥1% floor). Locks risk-free per the +2% trailing rule (though +1% currently, breakeven-trail conservative given strong move). Q4 results May 14 = binary 7 sessions out, outside 3-session catalyst window, no event-trim needed yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.5% at 373.85 vs SL 372 (~0.5% below CMP — tight). Stock faded from intraday high 388 to 374 — mean reversion after 10% Q4 results pop. Q4 PAT +156% YoY, order book Rs 2.4 lakh cr intact. SL adjacent to current price — hold to SL trigger or rebound. Loosening SL prohibited; tightening forces immediate exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7% at 1469.90, SL 1420 (~3.4% below CMP). Q4 PAT +124% YoY, FY26 pre-sales Rs 8,140 cr first-ever > Rs 8,000 cr. Faded from intraday high 1577 — typical post-results profit booking. Multiple brokerage targets 1560-1650. Hold to target 1570."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6800.00,
      "new_target": 7300.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.3% at 6968.50. Stored SL 6650 (3.6% entry, 4.6% below CMP) — too loose given stock now in profit. Tighten SL to 6800 (~2.4% below CMP, above prior support 6760, tightening from 6650 — permitted). 7.7x volume surge today and bullish chart with Q4 EBITDA margin doubled to 32.6%. Trail-gap 2.4% > 1% floor. R:R from CMP: reward 332 / risk 169 = 1.96."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already above breakeven, ~1.6% below CMP — appropriate trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 ~2.4% below CMP. Geopolitical hedge thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already above entry, 1.4% below CMP. 52-week-high breakout intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 already tight (~0.5% below CMP). Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sector leader today; thesis intact. SL 204 ~1.2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to entry (breakeven) — locks risk-free given +1% gain on strong defence momentum. 1.05% gap below CMP meets discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 372 already tight; hold to SL or rebound. Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst playing out; SL 1420 ~3.4% below CMP, hold to target 1570."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6800.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 6650 → 6800 (still 2.4% below CMP). 7.7x volume + Q4 beat support continued momentum; protect more of the move."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATATECH (+22% Q4 revenue growth in weak ER&D quarter, special dividend Rs 11.70) — strong setup but stock already +9% intraday, prefer pullback to ~615-620 before considering entry. BANDHANBNK setup is good but already held — will not stack. ADANIGREEN strong but Energy/Power cluster already represented via ADANIPORTS Adani-group exposure; hold off. VEDL post-demerger price discovery incomplete until mid-June listing of demerged entities — too noisy for entry. HFCL extended; CAMS faded from highs but FY26 PAT only +1.2% disappoints — pass. LALPATHLAB Q4 PAT -15% YoY despite revenue beat — gap-up looks like sentiment chase, no entry. BHEL/HAL/CAMS/MOTILALOFS would all add cluster concentration risk to existing book.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 49% deployed across 9 names — diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), Auto (MARUTI), Realty (SOBHA), Capital Goods/Defence (HAL, BHEL), Services (ADANIPORTS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), and ETF (GOLDBEES). Adding new positions today would mostly stack into already-represented clusters (Financials, Capital Goods). With Nifty soft, VIX at 18, US markets weak overnight, and 4 of 9 positions still unproven (red unrealized), the right action is to manage existing book — trail SLs on HAL and NAVINFLUOR to lock more gains, and let the rest run to their existing levels. NO new entries this tick; cash buffer 51% provides room for genuinely better setups in coming sessions. Performance context: profit factor 2.4x and average win nearly 2.1x average loss is healthy — no need to force trades."
}
